wine_restaurants.name: Osteria dei Vespri
wine_restaurants.address: Piazza Croce dei Vespri 6, 90133 Palermo (PA), Sicily
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-listed restaurant in 17th-century Palazzo Gangi Valguarnera; 650-plus-label cellar focused on Sicilian and Italian top denominations; modern cuisine from brothers Andrea and Alberto Rizzo.
wine_restaurants.tip: The wine list leans deep on Etna and Cerasuolo di Vittoria; allow 30 minutes to browse it.

verified.address_quoted: Piazza Croce dei Vespri 6, Palermo, Italy

wine_restaurants.name: Zash Restaurant
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred restaurant in a converted 19th-century oil mill at a boutique vineyard hotel on Etna's eastern slope; chef Giuseppe Raciti's creative Sicilian cuisine with an Etna-centric wine list.
wine_restaurants.tip: The wine list is especially strong on micro-producer Etna Rosso; book at least two weeks in advance.

verified.address_quoted: Strada Provinciale 2/I-II n.60 95018 Archi - Riposto (CT) - Sicily

wine_restaurants.name: Locanda Nerello
wine_restaurants.description: Restaurant at Monaci delle Terre Nere Relais and Chateaux wine resort; slow-food ethos with estate-grown ingredients and an Etna-focused wine list including the estate's own Nerello Mascalese.
wine_restaurants.tip: Stay overnight at the resort to access the full estate wine experience including vineyard walks.

wine_restaurants.name: Shalai Gourmet Restaurant
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred restaurant inside a restored 1800s nobleman's villa on Etna's north slope; chef Giovanni Santoro's cuisine paired with a meticulous Etna wine cellar.
wine_restaurants.tip: The Etna wine cellar has been curated specifically to complement Santoro's creative interpretations of local ingredients.

wine_restaurants.name: Bye Bye Blues
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred restaurant in Mondello run by chef Patrizia Di Benedetto and sommelier husband Antonio Barraco; wine list spotlights Sicily, top Italian denominations and an exceptional Champagne collection.
wine_restaurants.tip: Antonio Barraco's Champagne and Etna selection is considered among the best in Palermo.

wine_restaurants.name: La Foresteria Ristorante
wine_restaurants.address: Contrada Passo di Gurra, SP 79, Km 91, 92013 Menfi (AG), Sicily
wine_restaurants.description: Open-kitchen restaurant at Planeta Estate's wine resort; seasonal tasting menus and a la carte with Chef Angelo Pumilia; direct cellar access to Planeta's full portfolio across five Sicilian estates.
wine_restaurants.tip: The tasting menu paired with Planeta wines across their five Sicilian estates is the definitive experience.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Passo di Gurra, Ex S.S. 115 s.p. 79, Km 91 - 92013 Menfi (Ag)

wine_restaurants.name: Ristorante Vini Gambino
wine_restaurants.description: On-site restaurant at Gambino Winery on Etna's north slope at 700 m; traditional Sicilian cuisine paired with estate Tifeo Etna DOC wines including Rosso, Bianco and Rosato.
wine_restaurants.tip: Combine with a guided vineyard tour; the 4-wine tasting lunch is the best-value option.

wine_restaurants.name: Barone di Villagrande Estate Restaurant
wine_restaurants.description: Estate dining at Sicily's oldest Etna DOC producer (est. 1727); traditional Etna cuisine with estate Carricante and Nerello Mascalese pairings in a manor-house setting with infinity pool.
wine_restaurants.tip: The Contrada Villagrande Carricante is served exclusively at the estate; a rare treat.

verified.address_quoted: Via del Bosco, 25, 95010 Milo, Metropolitan City of Catania

wine_restaurants.name: Le Contrade di Cottanera
wine_restaurants.address: Strada Provinciale 89, Contrada Iannazzo, 95030 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily
wine_restaurants.description: Cellar-lunch experience at Cottanera pairing contrade-specific Nerello Mascalese vintages with traditional Etna recipes; Feudo di Mezzo vineyard walk included; booking essential.
wine_restaurants.tip: Request the Feudo di Mezzo single-vineyard Nerello Mascalese; among Etna's most expressive contrade.

verified.address_quoted: Strada Provinciale, 89 - Contrada Iannazzo, 95030 Castiglione di Sicilia CT

wine_restaurants.name: Palmento Costanzo Estate Dining
wine_restaurants.address: Contrada Santo Spirito, 95012 Passopisciaro, Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily
wine_restaurants.description: Lunch and tasting experiences in the restored 19th-century palmento at Passopisciaro; estate Nerello Mascalese and Carricante paired with local Etna produce in a listed heritage building.
wine_restaurants.tip: The most architecturally distinguished dining setting on Etna's north slope.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Santo Spirito, Passopisciaro 95012, Castiglione di Sicilia

wine_restaurants.name: Cantine Pellegrino Tasting Table
wine_restaurants.description: Guided tasting lunch at Cantine Pellegrino pairing dry, medium and sweet Marsala DOC with Sicilian food bites in the historic Ouverture tasting room overlooking the Egadi Islands.
wine_restaurants.tip: The Pantelleria Passito paired with almond-based Sicilian dolci is exceptional.

wine_restaurants.name: Feudo Maccari Estate Table
wine_restaurants.address: Contrada Maccari, Strada Provinciale Noto-Pachino KM 13.5, 96017 Noto (SR), Sicily
wine_restaurants.description: Estate dining at Feudo Maccari in Val di Noto; underground cellar tastings and Sicilian specialities in a stark desert-scrub landscape; Nero d'Avola and Syrah pairings with local seasonal produce.
wine_restaurants.tip: The underground cellar visit paired with Saia Nero d'Avola is the signature experience.

verified.address_quoted: C. Maccari, Strada Prov. Noto-Pachino, KM 13.5, 96017 Noto (SR)
